Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Restriction

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Restriction
public class Restriction extends Object
Restriction - An account restriction.

    Method
    Description
    Optional<Boolean>
    active()
    Indicates whether the restriction is active or not.
    static final Restriction.Builder
    builder()
     
    Optional<String>
    createReason()
    The plain-text reason set by a person or system explaining why the restriction was set
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime>
    createTime()
    The datetime of the object's creation
    Optional<String>
    createUserId()
    The user attributed to the restriction's placement on the account; typically expressed as an Auth user ID
    Optional<String>
    endedReason()
    The plain-text reason set by a person or system explaining why the restriction was removed If the restriction is active, the reason will not be set.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime>
    endedTime()
    The datetime of a restriction's removal from an account If the restriction is active, the ended time will not be set.
    Optional<String>
    endedUserId()
    The user attributed to the restriction's removal from the account; typically expressed as an Auth user ID If the restriction is active, the user will not be set.
    boolean
    equals(Object o)
     
    int
    hashCode()
     
    Optional<String>
    restrictionCode()
    A enumerated value indicating the nature of a restriction; prefixed by the concerned department (e.g., `MARGIN_CALL_VIOLATION_REG_T`); suspends related entitlements of the account until it is removed; most codes are administrated by the custodian but some are available for use by the integrator
    String
    toString()

    Indicates whether the restriction is active or not.

  • Method Details

    • active

      public Optional<Boolean> active()
      Indicates whether the restriction is active or not.

    • createReason

      public Optional<String> createReason()
      The plain-text reason set by a person or system explaining why the restriction was set

    • createTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime()
      The datetime of the object's creation

    • createUserId

      public Optional<String> createUserId()
      The user attributed to the restriction's placement on the account; typically expressed as an Auth user ID

    • endedReason

      public Optional<String> endedReason()
      The plain-text reason set by a person or system explaining why the restriction was removed If the restriction is active, the reason will not be set.

    • endedTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> endedTime()
      The datetime of a restriction's removal from an account If the restriction is active, the ended time will not be set.

    • endedUserId

      public Optional<String> endedUserId()
      The user attributed to the restriction's removal from the account; typically expressed as an Auth user ID If the restriction is active, the user will not be set.

    • restrictionCode

      public Optional<String> restrictionCode()
      A enumerated value indicating the nature of a restriction; prefixed by the concerned department (e.g., `MARGIN_CALL_VIOLATION_REG_T`); suspends related entitlements of the account until it is removed; most codes are administrated by the custodian but some are available for use by the integrator

    • builder

      public static final Restriction.Builder builder()

      public Restriction withActive(boolean active)
      Indicates whether the restriction is active or not.

      Indicates whether the restriction is active or not.

      The user attributed to the restriction's removal from the account; typically expressed as an Auth user ID If the restriction is active, the user will not be set.

      The user attributed to the restriction's removal from the account; typically expressed as an Auth user ID If the restriction is active, the user will not be set.

    • withRestrictionCode

      public Restriction withRestrictionCode(String restrictionCode)
      A enumerated value indicating the nature of a restriction; prefixed by the concerned department (e.g., `MARGIN_CALL_VIOLATION_REG_T`); suspends related entitlements of the account until it is removed; most codes are administrated by the custodian but some are available for use by the integrator

      A enumerated value indicating the nature of a restriction; prefixed by the concerned department (e.g., `MARGIN_CALL_VIOLATION_REG_T`); suspends related entitlements of the account until it is removed; most codes are administrated by the custodian but some are available for use by the integrator
